item.title: Product-Aware Deep Autoencoders for Robust Process Monitoring in Multi-Product Cyber-Physical Systems
item.description: arXiv:2606.00052v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: As Industry 4.0 accelerates the integration of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) in manufacturing, robust anomaly detection has become critical for ensuring process safety and security. Current data-driven approaches typically employ "product-agnostic" or ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> product, model, arxiv, framework | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 40%</small>
